reviews.comment:
UNA VERGUENZA QUE NO INTERVENGA LOS ESTADOS TANTO NACIONALES COMO PROVINCIAL. LA GENTE TODOS los días tiene que hacer por lo menos 1 hora de c9la para cargar ( la gente que trabaja es una locura) la excusa es que viene autos se afuera para cargar... ( no vi tantos autos ) y si fuera así ya que le recargan en precio a patentes extranjeras deberían tener más combustibles o licitar mas estaciones .
Además como tienen también el precio inflado sobre todo las Shell es muy difícil para qur te den ticket... siempre que lo pedis pasa algo y te lleva más o menso 25 minutos más.... en todas las estaciones que cargue en misiones...

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that neither the national nor provincial governments are intervening. Every day, people have to spend at least an hour in traffic to fill up (it's crazy for working people). The excuse is that cars from other provinces are coming to fill up... (I didn't see that many cars). And if that were the case, since they're charging extra for foreign license plates, they should have more fuel available or put more stations out to tender. Furthermore, since they also have inflated prices, especially at Shell, it's very difficult to get a receipt... every time you ask for one, something happens and it takes about 25 minutes longer... at every station I filled up at in Misiones.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNWFpZ2x3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It is not recommended because the fixed shift often lasts more than 4 hours and there are only two staff members available most of the time.
